detail.sr_review_summary: Reviewed WATCH: WFE 0.90 and OOS ExpR 0.207 = 98% of IS 0.210 — near-perfect OOS match on N=701, p<0.0001. SR alarm on N=35 monitored trades is expected noise; matches L3 standard.
